name: Trongate Control
description: Module import wizard, SQL file manager, Flo code generator, and package management endpoint. Provides the trongate_control/manifests API for module discovery and the Flo code generator for rapid CRUD module creation.
features: Automatic SQL file import when new modules are installed
Flo code generator for rapid CRUD module creation
Properties Builder for defining module fields
Query Builder for visual SQL join construction
Address data sets for property field suggestions
